description: China's second-largest and world's seventh-largest pure-play foundry. Specializes in specialty technologies including embedded/standalone NVM, power discrete, analog/power management, logic, and RF. Operates 8-inch and 12-inch fabs in Shanghai and Wuxi. Also listed on Shanghai STAR Market (688347.SS).

_externalRelationships.notes: China #2 foundry. Dual-listed: HKEX (1347.HK) and Shanghai STAR (688347.SS). Specialty process focus (power, NVM, analog). Over 7,400 employees. Sales offices in Japan, Taiwan, and USA. Shanghai HQ with Wuxi fab.
